ode_descriptions.expdecay: u' = -u,  u(0)=1  on  t in [0, 2];  exact  u = e^{-t}
ode_descriptions.logistic: u' = u(1-u),  u(0)=0.5  on  t in [0, 4];  exact  u = sigmoid(t)
